## Data Flow Patterns

### Pattern 1: User Message Sending (Most Common Path)

```
[1] User Types Message
         ↓
[2] UserChatPanel.chat_input
         ↓
[3] send_btn.clicked OR Enter pressed
         ↓
[4] UserChatPanel.message_sent.emit(text)
         ↓
[5] Dashboard._on_user_message(text)
         ↓
[6] Dashboard.send_message.emit(text)
         ↓
[7] Interface receives signal
         ↓
[8] Desktop Adapter.execute("send_message", text)
         ↓
[9] Router.route_to_system("intelligence")
         ↓
[10] CognitionKernel.process(action, context)
         ↓
[11] VALIDATION CHAIN:
     Layer 1: ValidatorAgent.sanitize_input()
     Layer 2: OversightAgent.check_compliance()
     Layer 3: FourLaws.validate_action()
     Layer 4: Triumvirate.consensus()
         ↓
[12] Memory.log_conversation("user", text)
         ↓
[13] Intelligence Processing
         ↓
[14] Memory.log_conversation("assistant", response)
         ↓
[15] Response → Interface
         ↓
[16] Dashboard.add_ai_response(response)
         ↓
[17] AIResponsePanel displays with HTML formatting
```

### Pattern 2: Personality Trait Update

```
[1] User Moves Slider in PersonaPanel
         ↓
[2] slider.valueChanged.connect(handler)
         ↓
[3] _on_slider_changed(trait, value)
         ↓
[4] personality_changed.emit({"trait": value})
         ↓
[5] Interface._on_personality_changed(traits)
         ↓
[6] Desktop Adapter.execute("update_persona", traits)
         ↓
[7] Router.route_to_system("ai_persona")
         ↓
[8] CognitionKernel.process(action, traits)
         ↓
[9] VALIDATION CHAIN:
     Layer 1: ValidatorAgent (schema check)
     Layer 2: OversightAgent (policy check)
     Layer 3: FourLaws (ethics check)
     Layer 4: Triumvirate (consensus)
         ↓
[10] AIPersona.update_personality(traits)
         ↓
[11] _save_state() → data/ai_persona/state.json
         ↓
[12] Success response → Interface
         ↓
[13] PersonaPanel.statistics_tab updates mood/traits
```

### Pattern 3: Image Generation with Content Safety

```
[1] User Enters Prompt in ImageGenerationLeftPanel
         ↓
[2] generate_btn.clicked
         ↓
[3] generate_requested.emit(prompt, style)
         ↓
[4] ImageGenerationWorker created
         ↓
[5] Worker.run():
         ↓
[6] check_content_filter(prompt) - 15 blocked keywords
         ↓
[7] CognitionKernel.process("generate_image")
         ↓
[8] VALIDATION CHAIN:
     Layer 1: ValidatorAgent (sanitize prompt)
     Layer 2: OversightAgent (keyword check)
     Layer 3: FourLaws (harmful imagery check)
     Layer 4: Triumvirate (approval)
         ↓
[9] If Override Active:
     CommandOverride.check_protocol("content_filter")
     → Bypass OversightAgent if OFF
         ↓
[10] Backend API Call (HF Stable Diffusion / OpenAI DALL-E)
         ↓
[11] Save image → generated_images/
         ↓
[12] Update history.json
         ↓
[13] finished.emit(image_path, metadata)
         ↓
[14] ImageGenerationRightPanel displays image
```

### Pattern 4: Learning Path Generation

```
[1] User Clicks "Generate Learning Path" in ProactiveActionsPanel
         ↓
[2] DashboardHandlers._on_generate_learning_path()
         ↓
[3] Input validation (topic, description)
         ↓
[4] Desktop Adapter.execute("create_learning_request")
         ↓
[5] Router.route_to_system("learning_manager")
         ↓
[6] CognitionKernel.process(action, params)
         ↓
[7] LearningRequestManager.create_request(topic, desc, priority)
         ↓
[8] Black Vault Check (SHA-256 hash)
         ↓
[9] If Not in Black Vault:
     → Insert into SQLite requests.db
     → Status: PENDING
         ↓
[10] Admin Approval (Dashboard UI - future)
         ↓
[11] approve_request(req_id)
         ↓
[12] Async Listeners Notified
         ↓
[13] PlannerAgent.schedule_learning_task()
         ↓
[14] Task Decomposition:
     Level 1: Strategic Plan
     Level 2: Tactical Subtasks
     Level 3: Operational Actions
     Level 4: Agent Delegation
     Level 5: Tool Invocation
         ↓
[15] Execute Learning → Update AIPersona.curiosity
         ↓
[16] Dashboard displays completion notification
```

## Wiki Link Navigation Patterns

### Cross-Directional Navigation

**From GUI to Core AI:**
```
relationships/gui/05_PERSONA_PANEL_RELATIONSHIPS.md
  ├─ [[../core-ai/02-AIPersona-Relationship-Map|AIPersona]]
  ├─ [[../core-ai/01-FourLaws-Relationship-Map|FourLaws]]
  └─ [[../core-ai/03-MemoryExpansionSystem-Relationship-Map|Memory]]
```

**From Core AI to GUI:**
```
relationships/core-ai/02-AIPersona-Relationship-Map.md
  ├─ [[../gui/05_PERSONA_PANEL_RELATIONSHIPS|PersonaPanel]]
  ├─ [[../gui/02_PANEL_RELATIONSHIPS|StatsPanel]]
  └─ [[../gui/01_DASHBOARD_RELATIONSHIPS|Dashboard]]
```

**From GUI to Agents:**
```
relationships/gui/03_HANDLER_RELATIONSHIPS.md
  ├─ [[../agents/AGENT_ORCHESTRATION#centralized-kernel-architecture|CognitionKernel]]
  ├─ [[../agents/VALIDATION_CHAINS#layer-1-validatoragent-data-validation|ValidatorAgent]]
  └─ [[../agents/PLANNING_HIERARCHIES|PlannerAgent]]
```

**From Agents to Core AI:**
```
relationships/agents/VALIDATION_CHAINS.md
  ├─ [[../core-ai/01-FourLaws-Relationship-Map|FourLaws]]
  ├─ [[../core-ai/06-CommandOverride-Relationship-Map|Override]]
  └─ [[../core-ai/03-MemoryExpansionSystem-Relationship-Map|Memory]]
```

### Deep-Link Navigation with Section Anchors

**Example: Validation Chain Layer 3**
```
From: relationships/gui/03_HANDLER_RELATIONSHIPS.md
Link: [[../agents/VALIDATION_CHAINS#layer-3-cognitionkernel-four-laws-validation|Four Laws Layer]]
Target: relationships/agents/VALIDATION_CHAINS.md, Section "Layer 3"
```

**Example: Governance Integration**
```
From: relationships/core-ai/01-FourLaws-Relationship-Map.md
Link: [[../agents/AGENT_ORCHESTRATION#governance-integration|Governance Flow]]
Target: relationships/agents/AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md, Section 6.2
```

## Integration Density Heatmap

```
System          GUI Links  Agent Links  Core AI Links  Total  Density
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FourLaws             18         47           32        97     CRITICAL
AIPersona            28         38           18        84     CRITICAL
Memory               24         31           16        71     HIGH
Learning             19         28           24        71     HIGH
Override             14         29           18        61     HIGH
CognitionKernel      22         58            -        80     CRITICAL
ValidatorAgent       14         34            -        48     HIGH
OversightAgent        8         26            -        34     MEDIUM
PlannerAgent          8         42           12        62     HIGH
PersonaPanel         18         12            -        30     HIGH
Dashboard            16         11            -        27     HIGH
ImageGeneration      14          8            -        22     MEDIUM
DashboardHandlers    22         19            -        41     HIGH
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TOTAL               225        383          120       728    (91% of 800)

Legend:
CRITICAL: 70+ links (core integration hub)
HIGH: 40-69 links (heavily integrated)
MEDIUM: 20-39 links (standard integration)
LOW: <20 links (minimal integration)
```

## Cross-System Dependency Graph

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    DEPENDENCY RELATIONSHIPS                      │
│              (Arrows show "depends on" direction)                │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

GUI Layer Dependencies:
  PersonaPanel ─────────────────┐
  Dashboard ───────────────────┐│
  ImageGeneration ─────────────┐││
  DashboardHandlers ───────────┐│││
                                ││││
                                ↓↓↓↓
Agent Layer Dependencies:    ┌──────────────┐
  ValidatorAgent ────────────→│ Cognition    │
  OversightAgent ────────────→│   Kernel     │←─── All GUI Handlers
  PlannerAgent ──────────────→│   (Hub)      │
  ExplainabilityAgent ───────→└──────┬───────┘
                                      │
                                      ↓
Core AI Layer Dependencies:    ┌──────────────┐
  AIPersona ─────────────────→│   FourLaws   │←─── CognitionKernel
  Memory ─────────────────────→│  (Ethics)    │
  Learning ───────────────────→└──────────────┘
  Plugins ────────────────────→
  Override (CONFIDENTIAL) ────→

Cross-Layer Dependencies:
  AIPersona ───────→ ContinuousLearning (external)
  FourLaws ────────→ PlanetaryDefenseCore (external)
  All Core AI ─────→ _atomic_write_json (utility)
  All Agents ──────→ CouncilHub (coordination)
  All GUI ─────────→ Desktop Adapter (interface)
```

## System Classification Matrix

```
┌──────────────────┬─────────────┬──────────────┬───────────────┬──────────────┐
│ System           │ Risk Level  │ Criticality  │ GUI Exposed?  │ Agent Layer? │
├──────────────────┼─────────────┼──────────────┼───────────────┼──────────────┤
│ FourLaws         │ CRITICAL    │ SAFETY       │ Read-only     │ Yes (Layer 3)│
│ AIPersona        │ HIGH        │ USER-FACING  │ Full access   │ Yes (traits) │
│ Memory           │ MEDIUM      │ DATA         │ Display only  │ Yes (logs)   │
│ Learning         │ HIGH        │ SAFETY       │ Trigger only  │ Yes (exec)   │
│ Plugins          │ LOW         │ NON-CRITICAL │ Future panel  │ Yes (extend) │
│ Override         │ CATASTROPHIC│ EMERGENCY    │ Admin hidden  │ Yes (bypass) │
│ CognitionKernel  │ CRITICAL    │ GOVERNANCE   │ Indirect      │ Central hub  │
│ ValidatorAgent   │ LOW         │ DATA         │ Via utils     │ Layer 1      │
│ OversightAgent   │ MEDIUM      │ COMPLIANCE   │ Via image gen │ Layer 2      │
│ PlannerAgent     │ LOW         │ EXECUTION    │ Future UI     │ Orchestrator │
│ Dashboard        │ LOW         │ UI           │ Main UI       │ Client       │
│ PersonaPanel     │ MEDIUM      │ UI           │ Main UI       │ Client       │
│ ImageGeneration  │ MEDIUM      │ UI           │ Feature panel │ Client       │
└──────────────────┴─────────────┴──────────────┴───────────────┴──────────────┘
```

## Quick Reference: Finding Related Systems

### For GUI Developers
**Question:** "Which agent validates user input?"  
**Answer:** See [[gui/02_PANEL_RELATIONSHIPS#related-systems|Panel Relationships]] → ValidatorAgent (Layer 1)

**Question:** "How do I route to a core system?"  
**Answer:** See [[gui/03_HANDLER_RELATIONSHIPS#related-systems|Handler Relationships]] → Governance Pipeline

**Question:** "Where is personality data stored?"  
**Answer:** See [[gui/05_PERSONA_PANEL_RELATIONSHIPS#trait-to-system-mapping|PersonaPanel]] → AIPersona → `data/ai_persona/state.json`

### For Agent Developers
**Question:** "How do I add a new agent operation?"  
**Answer:** See [[agents/AGENT_ORCHESTRATION#development-guidelines|Orchestration]] → Adding New Agent Operations

**Question:** "What are the validation layers?"  
**Answer:** See [[agents/VALIDATION_CHAINS#multi-layer-validation-architecture|Validation Chains]] → 4 layers

**Question:** "How does planning work?"  
**Answer:** See [[agents/PLANNING_HIERARCHIES#planning-hierarchy-levels|Planning]] → 5-level decomposition

### For Core AI Developers
**Question:** "Which GUI components use AIPersona?"  
**Answer:** See [[core-ai/02-AIPersona-Relationship-Map#related-systems|AIPersona]] → GUI Integration table

**Question:** "How do I enforce ethical constraints?"  
**Answer:** See [[core-ai/01-FourLaws-Relationship-Map#related-systems|FourLaws]] → Agent Integration → CognitionKernel

**Question:** "Where are learning requests approved?"  
**Answer:** See [[core-ai/04-LearningRequestManager-Relationship-Map#related-systems|Learning]] → GUI approval workflow (future)

## Wiki Link Syntax Reference

### Basic Link
```markdown
[[filename|Display Text]]
or
[[filename]] (uses filename as display text)
```

### Cross-Directory Link
```markdown
From gui/ to core-ai/:
  [[../core-ai/02-AIPersona-Relationship-Map|AIPersona]]

From agents/ to gui/:
  [[../gui/05_PERSONA_PANEL_RELATIONSHIPS|PersonaPanel]]
```

### Section Anchor Link
```markdown
[[filename#section-name|Display Text]]

Example:
[[../agents/VALIDATION_CHAINS#layer-3-cognitionkernel-four-laws-validation|Four Laws]]
```

### Multiple Section Anchors
```markdown
Section names are kebab-case:
• "## 2.1 ValidatorAgent Architecture" → #validatoragent-architecture
• "## Layer 1: Data Validation" → #layer-1-data-validation
• "### Core Responsibilities" → #core-responsibilities
```
